The '''Forgofshar Desert''' was a location on [[Carida/Legends|Carida]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military established a base on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], they used the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] for survival training.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=When the Desert Wind Turns: The Stormtrooper's Tale|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}} {{1stm}}
